actionUnits.condition: MonoBehaviour (instance id: 2013310826) matches script AttachToElevator (script guid: 077cb2d6a53b18f4ea7d76e72138fc77, script fileID: 11500000) attached to platform2 (2). To cover OnTriggerEnter: BoxCollider id 2013310828 must be set as isTrigger=1 (currently 0), and either platform2 (2) or the Player must have a Rigidbody. The 'player' field on the component is currently null (fileID: 0) and must be assigned to the intended Player GameObject. Then cause the Player to overlap platform2 (2). Note: due to code condition (if (gameObject == player)), even on enter no parenting will occur; still validates OnTriggerEnter execution.

To cover OnTriggerExit for AttachToElevator (MonoBehaviour instance id: 2013310826): maintain same setup as enter (BoxCollider id 2013310828 set to isTrigger=1, one Rigidbody present, 'player' field assigned). Move the Player out of overlap from platform2 (2) to produce exit. Note: due to code condition (if (gameObject == player)), even on exit no un-parenting will change because parenting never happened; still validates OnTriggerExit execution.
